overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic urban environment at dusk. The journey transitions from beneath an elevated highway with red neon underlighting to an open roadside with a towering glass skyscraper, then turns into a makeshift encampment where NPCs gather around barrel fires beneath the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk beneath the massive elevated highway structure

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure with glowing red lights underneath
silver metal safety barrier separating sidewalk from lower area
wet asphalt highway with multiple lanes for vehicle traffic
tropical palm tree visible through the overpass structure
hazy mountain silhouette on the horizon beneath the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive elevated highway structure illuminated by red neon lights overhead. The concrete sidewalk runs parallel to a wet multi-lane road with mountains visible in the distant haze, while a palm tree stands visible through the concrete pillars.

events.description: exits the covered highway underpass into open roadside area with full sky visibility
futuristic sedan drives past on the left side road

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the environment opens up to reveal the city skyline and towering buildings

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall modern glass building with illuminated red and blue 24/7 signage near the top
tall modern street lamp with glowing light fixture

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into the open dusk air, a massive glass skyscraper with bright 24/7 signage dominates the right side. A futuristic sedan passes on the road to the left as the elevated highway structure recedes into the distance behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial encampment approach with construction barriers

events.description: turns right off the main sidewalk into an open dirt area beneath the highway
enters the makeshift encampment area with industrial buildings and temporary structures

agents.ego_description: turning off the paved road and approaching a makeshift settlement area beneath the overpass

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete barriers blocking off sections of the lot
small yellow construction truck with utility bed parked near barriers
low industrial building with large ventilation equipment on the roof
metal drum with open flame providing light and warmth

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the main road into a dirt lot beneath the highway overpass. Construction barriers and a yellow utility truck sit near industrial buildings while the skyscraper recedes into the left background. A burning barrel becomes visible as the camera approaches the encampment area.

scene_state.functional_zone: homeless encampment with barrel fires and makeshift shelters

events.description: encounters first NPCs gathered around burning barrels in the encampment
approaches an NPC standing over another person lying on the ground in a confrontational stance

agents.ego_description: moving through the encampment observing the inhabitants and environment, approaching a confrontation

notable_agents.action: standing by a burning barrel warming hands, wearing casual clothing and cap
standing over another person lying on the ground, appearing to be in a dominant confrontational position

entered.detail: improvised shelter made of blue tarps and scrap materials supported by wooden poles
scattered piles of black and blue garbage bags and debris
silver futuristic four-door sedan parked near the tents
large illuminated screen displaying red and white advertisements
elevated water tank structure visible against the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: Navigating through a makeshift encampment beneath the highway where people gather around barrel fires. The area is cluttered with garbage bags, blue tarp shelters, and a parked futuristic sedan. The scene ends with a tense interaction as one inhabitant stands over another person lying on the ground near a burning barrel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit urban underpass into an open city street before descending into a gritty makeshift encampment. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway illuminated by red neon lights, moving along a wet sidewalk past concrete pillars and a lone palm tree with distant mountains visible in the haze. As the camera emerges from under the overpass into the dusk air, the view opens to a towering glass skyscraper with bright signage and a futuristic sedan passing on the road. The scene then shifts away from the main thoroughfare into a dirt lot filled with construction barriers and industrial buildings, where the skyscraper recedes into the background. Finally, the camera navigates through a cluttered settlement of blue tarp shelters and garbage bags, moving toward burning barrels where a tense interaction unfolds between two inhabitants.
